prompt: Create a cinematic luxury fashion editorial photograph in a modern concrete museum-like interior. A stylish young East Asian man with wavy tousled dark hair and a calm, aloof expression reclines against a pale concrete wall on the right side of the frame, looking slightly down toward the camera. He wears an all-black designer outfit: black turtleneck, tailored black blazer with satin lapels, black trousers, and a small gold CELINE-style brooch on the left chest. The pose is relaxed and elegant, with one leg extended toward the foreground and one hand tucked near the pocket, creating strong diagonal composition. The setting is a minimalist architectural lobby with polished dark marble floors, concrete pillars, large windows on the left with soft daylight, and an abstract white stone sculpture on a black pedestal in the background. Add refined editorial typography on the left side reading Beyond Style in large white serif letters. Use muted natural light, soft shadows, high-end magazine campaign styling, realistic skin texture, shallow depth of field, sophisticated neutral gray and black palette, widescreen 4:3 composition, no extra text, no watermark.
promptEn: Create a cinematic luxury fashion editorial photograph in a modern concrete museum-like interior. A stylish young East Asian man with wavy tousled dark hair and a calm, aloof expression reclines against a pale concrete wall on the right side of the frame, looking slightly down toward the camera. He wears an all-black designer outfit: black turtleneck, tailored black blazer with satin lapels, black trousers, and a small gold CELINE-style brooch on the left chest. The pose is relaxed and elegant, with one leg extended toward the foreground and one hand tucked near the pocket, creating strong diagonal composition. The setting is a minimalist architectural lobby with polished dark marble floors, concrete pillars, large windows on the left with soft daylight, and an abstract white stone sculpture on a black pedestal in the background. Add refined editorial typography on the left side reading Beyond Style in large white serif letters. Use muted natural light, soft shadows, high-end magazine campaign styling, realistic skin texture, shallow depth of field, sophisticated neutral gray and black palette, widescreen 4:3 composition, no extra text, no watermark.
promptZh: 创作一张电影质感的奢华时尚杂志风摄影作品，背景为现代混凝土风格的博物馆内景。一位时尚的东亚年轻男性，留着微卷凌乱的深色头发，表情冷静而疏离，靠在画面右侧的浅色混凝土墙上，目光微微向下看向镜头。他身着全黑设计师套装：黑色高领毛衣、带有缎面翻领的定制黑色西装外套、黑色长裤，左胸前佩戴一枚小巧的 CELINE 风格金色胸针。姿势放松且优雅，一条腿向前景延伸，一只手插在口袋附近，构成了强烈的对角线构图。场景为极简主义建筑大厅，地面为抛光深色大理石，配有混凝土柱，左侧大窗透入柔和的自然光，背景中有一个放置在黑色底座上的抽象白色石雕。在左侧添加精致的杂志风格排版，文字为 Beyond Style，使用醒目的白色衬线大写字母。采用柔和的自然光，阴影细腻，呈现高端杂志广告质感，皮肤纹理真实，浅景深效果，色调为高级的中性灰与黑色，采用宽屏 4:3 构图，无额外文字，无水印。
